topic: AI boom risks global financial crash, warn central bankers
headline: AI Bubble Risks Financial Chaos
caption:
As a full stack dev watching the AI surge, I see both incredible potential and serious risks. Rapid AI advancements can lead to financial bubbles if markets overreact or get overly speculative. It's important for engineers and regulators alike to understand these risks and promote responsible development. Staying cautious now can save us from tough times later. Remember, tech progress should lead to stability, not instability. Stay informed and build sustainably! 🚀💻

#AI #FinancialRisks #TechSafety #FullStackEngineer #AIInnovation
